overview: Cenegenics focuses on longevity and healthspan optimization through precision health diagnostics and personalized performance health programs. The clinic measures over 100 biomarkers to establish health baselines and provides ongoing guidance through a dedicated physician-led team.
highlights: Dedicated performance health team including physician, coach, coordinator, and phlebotomist
targetAudience: Health-conscious individuals interested in preventative medicine and optimizing their longevity through data-driven health strategies.
